_metadata.title: Work IQ MCP client config snippet
_metadata.purpose: Register the local Work IQ CLI as an MCP stdio server for any MCP host (VS Code, Claude Desktop, custom agent). Copy the entry under 'servers' / 'mcpServers' into your host's MCP config.
_metadata.note: Uses delegated auth from the signed-in `workiq` account; first connection may require an interactive browser sign-in.
